title: Colorful Flares
description: Did I hear flares? Colorful Flares is a mod made to help you quickly illuminate areas, light your surrounding or use them to tell your friends about your location. (Started as an self-educational project)
body:
# Colorful Flares
Colorful Flares is a mod created with the objective of helping players to illuminate large areas temporarily for exploring, specially caves. Comes with the bonus of being also useful to tell your friends your position thanks to the colored smoke these flares emit.

![A flare in a player's view that is exploring a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bdf918aa41c4dba52b2752248d96f9060de4ab4_0.webp)

## Features
- Throwable flares
- 13 different colors
- Sets entities on fire when hitting them at high enough speeds
- 2 minutes despawn timer

![The 13 different colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27a162b537f6c3039081465fb1aa66be925d82d5.png)
